title: Creating a cluster with kubeadm — Preparing the required container images
text:
This step is optional and only applies in case you wish
kubeadm init
and
kubeadm join
to not download the default container images which are hosted at
registry.k8s.io
.
Kubeadm has commands that can help you pre-pull the required images
when creating a cluster without an internet connection on its nodes.
See
Running kubeadm without an internet connection
for more details.
Kubeadm allows you to use a custom image repository for the required images.
See
Using custom images
for more details.
